# @nodesecure/cache

## 2.0.0

### Major Changes

- [#690](https://github.com/NodeSecure/cli/pull/690) [`027af46`](https://github.com/NodeSecure/cli/commit/027af462095bd0340fd9bdab397271bef078ad40) Thanks [@fraxken](https://github.com/fraxken)! - Major refactor to enhance cache integration

### Minor Changes

- [#757](https://github.com/NodeSecure/cli/pull/757) [`b70d636`](https://github.com/NodeSecure/cli/commit/b70d636004eec0f6bd23a1dca3e40e2f499cbe01) Thanks [@PierreDemailly](https://github.com/PierreDemailly)! - Add support for `NODESECURE_PAYLOADS_PATH` env

### Patch Changes

- [#757](https://github.com/NodeSecure/cli/pull/757) [`b70d636`](https://github.com/NodeSecure/cli/commit/b70d636004eec0f6bd23a1dca3e40e2f499cbe01) Thanks [@PierreDemailly](https://github.com/PierreDemailly)! - Reset `currentSpec` to `null` when manifest load fails
